question: [File: 'File Name: grpc/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/grpc/controller/ConsensusController.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: toResponse()] Can an unprivileged external user subscribe to a topic and observe that toResponse() exposes chunkTotal via ConsensusMessageChunkInfo.Builder.setTotal(t.getChunkTotal()), allowing the user to infer the total size of multi-chunk fee-bearing transactions and correlate chunk counts with fee amounts to reverse-engineer fee calculation parameters?
